verbatim_quote: Any company that's a clone of something else that already exists with some small or made up differentiator, like we're gonna be x beautiful design or we're gonna be y for people that like red wine instead. So as I mentioned one of the great things about being a student is you have a very good perspective on new technology.
gloss: [PREDICTION] Any company that's a clone of something else that already exists with some small or made up differentiator, like we're gonna be x beautiful design or we're gonna be y for people...
